forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWMEEA0FQB66C11H0V13TGR4
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8c80
+title: Migrate Multitool Librarian onto MetadataSearcher (cross-repo)
+---
+## What
+**Cross-repo task — all changes land in `../FoundationModelsMultitool`** per plan.md §9/M5 and Multitool's own plan ("Planned migration → ../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry", plan.md:444-456):
+- Add `.package(path: "../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry")` to `../FoundationModelsMultitool/Package.swift`
+- `Librarian` becomes a thin wrapper over `MetadataSearcher<APISurface.Entry>` (blocks: existing `Entry.block`); delete `lexicallyFilter` — over-budget now goes through ranked retrieval top-M (`onRetrievalCut` replaces `onPrefilterCut` semantics; keep a compatible callback surface)
+- `AgentSession` + `RoutedAgentSession` move upstream: Multitool re-exports/imports them from this package; delete the local copies
+- `FoundAPIs` becomes formatting only in `FindAPITool` over verbatim `Match.block`s (ids-only selection underneath)
+
+Behavior deltas Multitool gains: ids-only selection, id-enum grammar, RRF instead of substring filtering.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Multitool's existing librarian test suite passes against the wrapper (adjusted only where the plan's behavior deltas intentionally change expectations — each such adjustment called out in the commit)
+- [ ] No remaining `lexicallyFilter` or local `AgentSession` definition in Multitool sources
+- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass in `../FoundationModelsMultitool`
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Existing `../FoundationModelsMultitool/Tests/` librarian tests are the regression harness — run `swift test` there, exit 0
+- [ ] Add a wrapper-level test asserting `FindAPITool` output blocks are verbatim `APISurface.Entry.block` strings
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
